VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title, published at ECCV 2024 (proceedings published 2025), with lead author Yi Wang and co-authors including Kunchang Li, Xinhao Li, Jiashuo Yu, Yinan He, and others — matching the cited author list. The venue year discrepancy (cited as 2025 vs. the ECCV 2024 conference) reflects the Springer proceedings publication date, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-73013-9_23
